title: Extend workflow template registry validation and lossless writes
objective: Implement registry validation and persistence behavior for required phase output/handoff contracts, import/update/delete support, unknown-field preservation, built-in protection, and cache reset.
expected_outputs: src/server/services/workflowTypes.ts （修改，如 type additions are required）
anti_goals: Do not add project-level template storage.
Do not mutate workflow session snapshots.
Do not overwrite malformed user config silently.
acceptance_criteria: Built-in template remains startable for missing/malformed config.
Built-in id shadowing and duplicate ids are rejected.
Missing output artifact or handoff semantics are rejected.
Unknown fields are preserved on valid writes.
Registry cache resets after successful writes.
